title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Mindspace Business Parks REIT - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Mindspace Business Parks REIT - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Sales Manager looking for your next big career move? Mindspace Business Parks REIT in Hyderabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Mindspace Business Parks REIT:
Mindspace Business Parks REIT is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mindspace Business Parks REIT!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
